Name: Annie Hall
Review:
“And the guy says, I would, but I need the eggs.”

It seems Woody himself is trying to understand how relationships work, in his own witty way. Yet he’s fully aware that he could never truly explain them , and as much as that terrifies him, that’s precisely the magic.
